summary: Birth Record Feature testing completed. Backend APIs fully functional (10/10 tests passed). Frontend BirthRecordSection component renders correctly on midwife client detail page when page is fully scrolled.

issues: BirthRecordSection renders below the fold - requires scrolling past Labor Records to see it

data-testid attributes added for create-birth-record-btn and edit-birth-record-btn
Backend API correctly handles GET (returns empty {} when no record, full record when exists), POST (creates/updates)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Component renders and displays birth record data correctly

seed_data_creation: Test birth record created via API for client_a034be9c9748 with comprehensive data: VBAC, Birth Center, Comprehensive Test Baby (male, 9lb 4oz, 21in), APGAR 7/9, 400ml blood loss, 1st degree tear
context_for_next_testing_agent: Birth Record feature fully implemented. The BirthRecordSection appears AFTER Labor Records on the client detail page - you need to scroll down to see it. When no record exists, shows empty state with 'Create Birth Record' button. When record exists, shows detailed summary with Edit button. All form sections verified: Timeline, Birth Details, Newborn, Condition, Maternal Outcomes, Postpartum, Transfer, Birth Story Notes.
